title: Identify Sorter Queue, Exit, and Shutdown Locations on the Sorter Layout
summary: Use the documented sorter layout training material to identify the entrance queue, exchange staging queue locations, sorter queue locations, exit queue, and shutdown queue locations. This reference also captures the source-described distinction between shutdown positions for AGVs without totes and AGVs with totes, including the noted off-the-end path for an AGV entering during shutdown with a tote.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing the sorter layout training material or equivalent layout view to understand where AGVs and totes are expected to enter, stage for exchange, pick up totes into the aisle, exit after exchange, and position during shutdown.
not_for: Not for issuing AGV movement commands or changing system state.
Not for inferring exact physical positions beyond what is stated in the source and visible in the referenced layout artifact.
Not for site-specific validation when observed floor labeling or layout differs from the documented training material.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the documented sorter layout and identify the queue, exit, and shutdown areas as described in the source.

safety_notes: This is a reference procedure derived from training material and does not provide control actions or system commands.
Escalate if the observed layout or site labeling does not match the documented queue and shutdown area descriptions.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the sorter layout training material or equivalent layout view
Visual access to the referenced layout artifact if available

access_required: Access to the training video material or extracted layout slide/frame
system_preconditions: Sorter layout view is available for review

visual_references.description: Training slide frame showing the sorter layout design and the explained entrance queue, queue locations, sorter queue locations, exit queue, and shutdown queue areas.

steps.title: Open the sorter layout view
steps.purpose: Establish the visual reference used to identify the documented queue and shutdown areas.
steps.instruction: Locate the sorter layout view or training slide that shows the queue areas for the sorter layout.
steps.expected_result: The sorter layout image is available for review.
steps.healthy_condition: A layout view is visible that supports identification of entrance queue, queue locations, sorter queue locations, exit queue, and shutdown queue areas.
steps.failure_condition: The layout view is unavailable, unclear, or does not show the referenced queue and shutdown areas.

actions.label: Locate layout reference
actions.exact_action: Locate the sorter layout view or slide that shows the queue areas.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Layout image showing entrance queue, queue locations, sorter queue locations, exit queue, and shutdown queue areas.

stop_or_escalate_if: The referenced layout artifact is not available.
The visible layout does not support identification of the documented areas.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Training slide frame showing the sorter layout design while the presenter explains entrance, queue, exit, and shutdown queue locations for AGV tote movement.

steps.title: Identify the entrance queue
steps.purpose: Confirm the first queue area described for anything entering the sorter area.
steps.instruction: Identify the entrance queue on the layout and verify that it is the first queue area described for anything entering the sorter area.
steps.expected_result: The entrance queue is identified as the first queue area for entry into the sorter area.
steps.healthy_condition: The layout interpretation matches the source statement that anything entering this area must go to the entrance queue first.
steps.failure_condition: The entrance queue cannot be identified or the observed layout appears inconsistent with the source description.

actions.label: Find entrance queue
actions.exact_action: Identify the entrance queue and verify that it is the first queue area described for anything entering the sorter area.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The entrance queue location on the sorter layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: The observed layout or labeling does not match the documented entrance queue description.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Anything that wants to go into this area must go to the entrance queue first...

steps.title: Identify exchange staging queue locations
steps.purpose: Locate the queue positions used by AGVs staging behind for an exchange.
steps.instruction: Identify the queue locations where AGVs stage behind for an exchange.
steps.expected_result: The exchange staging queue locations are identified on the layout.
steps.healthy_condition: The identified queue locations align with the source description of AGVs staging behind for an exchange.
steps.failure_condition: The exchange staging queue locations cannot be distinguished from other queue areas.

actions.label: Find exchange staging queues
actions.exact_action: Identify the queue locations where AGVs stage behind for an exchange.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Queue locations described as AGVs staging behind for an exchange.

stop_or_escalate_if: The layout does not clearly show the queue locations used for exchange staging.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: queue locations... AGVs stage behind for an exchange...

steps.title: Identify sorter queue locations for tote pickup
steps.purpose: Locate the positions where the tote is picked up and moved into the aisle.
steps.instruction: Identify the sorter queue locations where the tote is picked up and moved into the aisle.
steps.expected_result: The sorter queue locations for tote pickup are identified on the layout.
steps.healthy_condition: The identified locations match the source description of tote pickup and movement into the aisle.
steps.failure_condition: The sorter queue locations cannot be identified or are confused with other queue areas.

actions.label: Find sorter queue locations
actions.exact_action: Identify the sorter queue locations where the tote is picked up and moved into the aisle.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Sorter queue locations described as the points where the tote is picked up and moved into the aisle.

stop_or_escalate_if: The layout does not clearly distinguish sorter queue locations from other queue areas.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: sorter queue locations... pick up the tote and leave into the aisle...

steps.title: Identify the exit queue
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented path after an exchange.
steps.instruction: Identify the exit queue and verify that after an exchange the AGV goes to the exit queue before going anywhere else.
steps.expected_result: The exit queue is identified as the next destination after an exchange.
steps.healthy_condition: The layout interpretation matches the source statement that after an exchange the AGV must go to the exit queue.
steps.failure_condition: The exit queue cannot be identified or the observed layout appears inconsistent with the source description.

actions.label: Find exit queue
actions.exact_action: Identify the exit queue and verify that after an exchange the AGV goes to the exit queue before going anywhere else.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The exit queue location on the sorter layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: The observed layout or labeling does not match the documented exit queue description.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: after an exchange, it must go to the exit queue.

steps.title: Identify shutdown queue locations by tote state
steps.purpose: Differentiate the shutdown positions described for AGVs without totes versus AGVs with totes.
steps.instruction: Identify the shutdown queue locations and compare which positions are described for AGVs without totes versus the location described for AGVs with totes.
steps.expected_result: Shutdown queue locations are identified, including the distinction between AGVs without totes and AGVs with totes.
steps.healthy_condition: The layout interpretation reflects the source-described separation between shutdown locations for AGVs without totes and the location for AGVs with totes.
steps.failure_condition: Shutdown locations cannot be differentiated by tote state from the available source material.

actions.label: Find shutdown queue locations
actions.exact_action: Identify the shutdown queue locations and compare which positions are described for AGVs without totes versus the location described for AGVs with totes.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Shutdown queue locations and any visible distinction between AGVs without totes and AGVs with totes.

stop_or_escalate_if: The shutdown locations shown on the layout do not match the documented tote-dependent shutdown description.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: We have shutdown queues... when you shut down, they move to shutdown locations... these locations are AGVs without totes... this location is for AGVs with totes...

steps.title: Check whether shutdown locations are under the rack
steps.purpose: Capture the source-noted physical distinction for shutdown locations if it is visible on the layout.
steps.instruction: Check whether the shutdown locations are described as under the rack and note that distinction if visible on the layout.
steps.expected_result: The reviewer notes whether the shutdown locations are shown or described as under the rack.
steps.healthy_condition: The under-rack distinction is visible or supported by the source description and is recorded as part of the layout interpretation.
steps.failure_condition: The under-rack distinction is not visible in the artifact and cannot be confirmed from the layout alone.

actions.label: Verify under-rack shutdown note
actions.exact_action: Check whether the shutdown locations are described as under the rack and note that distinction if visible on the layout.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Layout or diagram showing shutdown locations under the rack if visible.

stop_or_escalate_if: The source description says shutdown locations are under the rack but the available layout view is too unclear to confirm.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: these locations are under the rack...

steps.title: Note shutdown entry behavior for AGVs with totes
steps.purpose: Capture the source-described routing behavior for an AGV entering during shutdown with a tote.
steps.instruction: If reviewing shutdown entry behavior, note that an AGV entering during shutdown with a tote is described as going off the end and then to shutdown.
steps.expected_result: The shutdown entry behavior for an AGV with a tote is documented as part of the layout interpretation.
steps.healthy_condition: The reviewer records the source-described off-the-end path before shutdown for an AGV entering during shutdown with a tote.
steps.failure_condition: The reviewer cannot reconcile shutdown entry behavior with the available source material or observed layout.

actions.label: Record shutdown entry path
actions.exact_action: If reviewing shutdown entry behavior, note that an AGV entering during shutdown with a tote is described as going off the end and then to shutdown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Any visible path or labeled area supporting the off-the-end routing note during shutdown entry with a tote.

stop_or_escalate_if: The observed layout or site behavior appears inconsistent with the documented off-the-end shutdown entry description.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: if you come into the entrance and we're in a shutdown state and you have a tote, you go to off the end and then you go to the shutdown.

success_criteria: The entrance queue is identified as the first queue area for entry into the sorter area.
The exchange staging queue locations are identified.
The sorter queue locations for tote pickup into the aisle are identified.
The exit queue is identified as the destination after exchange.
Shutdown queue locations are identified, including the distinction between AGVs without totes and AGVs with totes.
The under-rack shutdown note and off-the-end shutdown entry behavior are captured when visible or described.
healthy_conditions: The layout view matches the source-described queue and shutdown areas.
The reviewer can distinguish entrance, exchange staging, sorter queue, exit, and shutdown locations from the provided artifact and source text.
No unsupported assumptions are needed to interpret the documented layout.
failure_conditions: The referenced layout artifact is unavailable or unclear.
The observed layout or site labeling does not match the documented queue and shutdown descriptions.
Exact physical positions would need to be inferred beyond what is stated in the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the observed layout or site labeling does not match the documented queue and shutdown area descriptions.
Escalate if the available artifact does not clearly support identification of the required queue or shutdown locations.
Do not infer exact physical positions beyond what is stated in the source and visible in the referenced layout artifact.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary sorter layout reference for entrance queue, exchange staging queue locations, sorter queue locations, exit queue, and shutdown queue areas.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Anything that wants to go into this area must go to the entrance queue first... queue locations... AGVs stage behind for an exchange... sorter queue locations... pick up the tote and leave into the aisle... after an exchange, it must go to the exit queue.

We have shutdown queues... these locations are under the rack... when you shut down, they move to shutdown locations... these locations are AGVs without totes... this location is for AGVs with totes... if you come into the entrance and we're in a shutdown state and you have a tote, you go to off the end and then you go to the shutdown.

missing_details: The source provides a layout explanation rather than a full operating procedure.
The source does not provide commands, control actions, or HMI navigation steps for this reference task.
The source does not provide a time estimate.
The source does not define exact physical coordinates or labels for each queue position beyond the layout explanation.
